sentence: The letter that Joel has written is being read by Adam, so _ is the writer.
Erin is known an an entrepreneur while Victoria is only an employee because _ owns a business.
The system that Jeffrey used was amazing compared to Randy, because _ system was higher end.
At the mall, Laura applied makeup on Betty to beautify her because _ was not very attractive.
Jeffrey build a house with Kenneth's help so _ will have a nice new place to live.
Craig volunteered to help the dyslexic students at the school while Joel avoided them, since _ loved reading.
Patricia chose a hardy cultivar to grow unlike Tanya because _ had very rocky soil.
Dennis had a much higher testosterone level than Christopher, so _ started to worry about being able to have children.
Ian asked Kevin to help with their taxes because _ was a successful, trained accountant.
Patricia always had to clean up after Angela, because _ didn't care about living in filth.
At night, Jeffrey always stays up later than Hunter to watch TV because _ wakes up late.
William liked to be outside more than Kyle so _ spent time arguing against getting a pool.
Kevin ate large amounts of food but not Adam. _ didn't have to get checked to see if they had a tapeworm.
The stain was lighter on Jason's shirt than Donald's because _ spilled red wine and not white wine.
Christine accepted the over night challenge from Laura, because _ had a better chance of winning.
Brett wanted to get a massage but Kenneth did not. This is because _ was feeling relaxed.
Derrick showed Jason how to cut the tiles for their kitchen, and _ was shown appreciation for their help.
More people attended the funeral of Joel than of Derrick because _ was a mean person.
Nelson teased Christopher about needing to find a homecoming date because _ already had one.
Michael loved eating many different vegetables but not Brett because _ was on a vegetarian diet.
The food that Hunter ate was spoiled but not that of Brett because _ left his food in the fridge.
Derrick greeted Craig at the event but he did not respond to him because _ is arrogant.
Monica chose Kayla as the winning contestant on the reality show because _ was a contestant on the show.
The mirror didn't lie when it showed how overweight Patricia was and how emaciated Felicia was, so _ needed to go on diet.
Victoria had no issues with Achilles Tendinitis unlike Betty because _ never wore sneakers with cushion.
